---
id: update-rule
title: "Update STP rule"
description: "Updates all fields of an existing STP rule and reloads the in-memory rule cache."
sidebar_label: "Update STP rule"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update STP rule"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/v1/stp/rules/{ruleId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates all fields of an existing STP rule and reloads the in-memory rule cache.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
